description: Sokoban with grab/carry mechanic. L1: 3 blocks at (44,24), (16,28), (32,36) must be placed on target zone at (28,28)-(36,28). Player starts at (32,48). Sequence: (1) navigate to right of Block A, grab, carry left 2 + down 1 to (36,28); (2) navigate to left of Block B, grab, carry right 3 to (28,28); (3) navigate below Block C, grab, carry up 2 to (32,28).
